name: TestWaitForDiagVariantIdentificationCompleted, TestWaitForDiagEcuVariantIdentificationCompleted
title: TestWaitForDiagVariantIdentificationCompleted, TestWaitForDiagEcuVariantIdentificationCompleted
description: Waits for the completion of the automatic variant identification algorithm. If the qualifier of an expected variant is given, an error is returned if a different variant is identified.

parameters.name: expectedVariant
parameters.description: Qualifier of the variant that should be identified.
